%sh
 
 
echo "%table"
 
#create header
echo -e "Year\tTotal Points" > outputfile.txt
 
#generate output data
cat C:\Users\Aibes\.Neo4jDesktop\neo4jDatabases\database-abe261de-854b-418a-a7e1-91e1f7d8acf7\installation-3.3.3\evaluates112018
    evaluates112018.csv \
  | tr ',' '\t' \
  |  awk '{FS="\t"; OFS="\t"}  $10 == "${e.Size=2}" {arr[$5]+=$11} END{for(x in arr) print x, arr[x]}' \
  | sort \
  >> outputfile.txt
 
#display output 
cat outputfile.txt

%spark // default output is text (1 to 3).foreach{i=> println(new java.util.Date()) Thread.sleep(1000) } // print something in html println(s"""%html

Some HTML

""") // create table println(s"""%table key\tvalue sun\t100 moon\t200 """) // display text again println("""%text""") (1 to 3).foreach{i=> println(new java.util.Date()) Thread.sleep(1000) } // another table Thread.sleep(1000) println(s"""%table key\tvalue apple\t100 banana\t200 """)

paragraphs.text:
%spark

val lines = sc.textFile("C:/Users/Aibes/.Neo4jDesktop/neo4jDatabases/database-abe261de-854b-418a-a7e1-91e1f7d8acf7/installation-3.3.3/readme")

counts = (lines.flatMap(lambda x: x.split(' '))          
                  .map(lambda x: (x, 1))                 
                  .reduceByKey(lambda x,y : x + y))


output = counts.take(10)                                 

for (word, count) in output:                             
    print("%s: %i" % (word, count))
